column1: # M7 slice 7 — /Graph Save writes the current graph to disk as SVG.
# Extension defaults to .svg when none is typed; the bytes are always
# Seed a few cells so the graph has something to plot.
# /GTB /GA<POINT>~ — Bar with A1..A4 as series A.
# /GS — prompt for filename. Typing a bare name (no extension) gets
# `.svg` appended. Write into the per-transcript $TMPDIR so no files
